name: Can I sue if an AI tool spreads false info about my law firm?
description: Possible via defamation/product liability; prove harm.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue if an AI tool spreads false info about my law firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Possible via defamation/product liability; prove harm.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, potentially under defamation, fraud, or product liability if AI outputs provably false, harmful info traceable to biased training.**[1] Attorneys verify creator liability for defects or false info.[1] **Key factors:** 1. Prove intent or negligence in AI design.[1] 2. NY courts address AI fairness.[10] 3. Hard due to black-box models. **Document outputs, notify platform, consult specialist; class actions emerging.**[1] Viable but challenging.[1]
